name: Medieval Stone Watchtower
description: A squat stone-brick watchtower with battlements, dark oak trim, and small slit windows. Reads as a guard post on the edge of a kingdom's walls — heavy, defensive, weathered.
notes: Use stone_bricks as primary, dark_oak_log accent. Short and stout (height ≈ 4× radius). Ample interior floors for guard quarters.
